title: aconitum vulparia f. monanense
intro: Aconitum vulparia f. monanense, also known as wolf's bane, is a subspecies of the Aconitum vulparia plant, a perennial flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. It contains aconitine, a toxic alkaloid with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat pain, inflammation, and skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. The plant is believed to have health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving arthritis, and promoting wound healing, although its toxicity requires careful preparation and dosing. Herbal preparations of Aconitum vulparia f. monanense can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and salves, but should only be used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare practitioner due to its toxicity.
